title: Manepear God Armor
body:
Features:
Helmet: Increased break speed, break any block with ease

Chestplate: Increased attack speed, can instantly hit

Leggings: Increased walk speed, equivalent to speed II

Boots: Increased health, grants 20 hearts

How to obtain:
The armor is obtained by admins through the command /armours which opens a gui of all the armour. Admins should give these out in events
